case_title: XIE, CHANG VS LUONG, AN NHU et al

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY XIE, CHANG AS TO DEFENDANT LUONG, AN NHU LUONG, JEANNE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-19-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LUONG, AN NHU LUONG, JEANNE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF XIE, CHANG IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LUONG, AN NHU LUONG, JEANNE (THE MAIN AWARD WAS TO THE WIFE WHO BROUGHT A SEPARATE CLAIM; BASED UPON TESTIMONY OF WIFE, THE PLAINTIFF, HER HUSBAND HAD NO SPECIALS) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
